notes: JUSTICE's six-face arcana die. SUSTAINED is the highest success — the objection holds, the record is yours. STRICKEN is the failure — the exhibit doesn't make it in.

faces.description: Success ★★. The objection holds. Defense steps back. Advance two.
Success ★. The motion is recorded. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. Erica wants to read further. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 WEIGHT).
Partial. The clerk's pen pauses. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or take it (+1 WEIGHT).
Failure. The exhibit didn't come in. +1 WEIGHT.
Wild. ★★ if Erica is engaged this turn — the bench is with you. Otherwise: failure, and the gavel waits.
